productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Blue Sweatshirt
description: Composition Blue sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed collar, v-shaped stitch detail at neckline, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, appliquéd and embroidered branding on the chest and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Stay cosy in in all seasons with this stylish sweatshirt from US Polo. The soft cotton fabric against your skin gives you exemplary comfort. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it as a top layer over your Sports kit or over a t-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
